Util functions¶

bdp_util¶

bdp_util.sendEmail(to, subject, plain_body, html_body)¶
bdp_util.sendEmails(emailList)¶
bdp_util.sendNotificationToUsers(endpoint, usergroups, action, userJSON)¶
bdp_util.sendSlack(to, msg)¶

bdp_dbutil¶

class bdp_dbutil.BDPDBConnection¶
getDBConnection(enforce=False)¶
static getInstance()¶
bdp_dbutil.checkExcistingIncident(tenant_id, hardware_uid)¶

Check whether an incident was already created

Parameters

  • tenant_id (int) – Tenant ID

  • hardware_uid (int) – Hardware unique ID

Returns

dictionary if found else False

bdp_dbutil.createHumidityTable(hardware_uid, datapoint_amount)¶

Creates a pandas table with humidity

Parameters

  • hardware_uid (int) – Hardware unique ID

  • datapoint_amount (int) – Amount to datapoints to extract

Returns

pandas.DataFrame

bdp_dbutil.createNotificationRecord(incidentid, type_code, usergroups)¶
bdp_dbutil.getHardwareByDevice(device)¶
bdp_dbutil.getHardwareByHardwareUID(hardware_uid)¶
bdp_dbutil.getIncidentByIncidentID(incident_id)¶
bdp_dbutil.getIncidentID(incident)¶
bdp_dbutil.getNotificationByNotificationID(nid)¶
bdp_dbutil.getNotificationDetailsById(notification_id)¶
bdp_dbutil.getNotificationsByIncidentID(incidentid)¶
bdp_dbutil.getPlottingData(hardware_uid, datapoint_amount=480, plotpoint_amount=8, datapoint_types=['TIME', 'HUMIDITY'])¶

Create an overview points od the plotpoint_amount about the data points of datapoint_amount

Parameters

  • hardware_uid (int) – Hardware unique ID

  • datapoint_amount (int) – Amount to datapoints to extract

  • plotpoint_amount (int) – Amount to plotting points to extract (values are averaged out from datapoints)

  • datapoint_types (list) – List of datapoints types that should be extracted from the table

Returns

list arrays that contain different datapoint types

bdp_dbutil.getRawEventsByHardwareUID(hardware_uid, datapoints_amount)¶
bdp_dbutil.getTableName(tablename)¶
bdp_dbutil.getTenantByName(tenant)¶
bdp_dbutil.getTenantByTenantID(tenant_id)¶
bdp_dbutil.getUserByUserID(user_id)¶
bdp_dbutil.getUsersWithNIDs(tenant_id)¶

Returns a list of users that are associated with current time and assigns a notification ID

Parameters

tenant_id (int) – length

Returns

list of users

bdp_dbutil.getUsersWithNIDsAtTimes(tenant_id, times)¶

Returns a list of users that are associated with certain times and assigns a notification ID

Parameters

  • tenant_id (int) – length

  • times (enum) – availability times

Returns

list of users

bdp_dbutil.insertIncident(existing_incident, new_incident, tenant_id)¶
bdp_dbutil.insertResponderToIncidentID(incident_id, responder_id)¶
bdp_dbutil.snoozeFlip(incident_id, state)¶

Flips the snooze flag.

Parameters

  • incident_id (int) – Incident ID

  • state (bool) – If true, the flag is set; otherwise removed

bdp_dbutil.updateIncidentNotifyTime(incidentid)¶
bdp_dbutil.updateIncidentStatus(incident_id, actionstr)¶
bdp_dbutil.updateNotificationResponse(nid, response)¶
